ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-18-2023 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-29-2023 Continued To Jun-13-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion (Motions)
Off Calendar Mar-01-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for motion for default judgment prove-up hearing.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 11:13:42 a.m. and concluding at 11:21:10 a.m.

Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A. represented by Breanne Reese, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Maher S. Mostafa not appearing.

Plaintiff has not witnesses.
Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

The following exhibits are MARKED/ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE:

Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 1 - Consumer Credit Card Customer Agreement & Disclosure Statement

Counsel for Plaintiff is examined by the Court.

The matter is submitted.
Based on the summary of the case, comments made by Plaintiff's Counsel, and evidence presented, and the Court finds that Plaintiff has proven each essential element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A., and against Maher S. Mostafa, as follows:

Counsel for Plaintiff's request for attorney fees is DENIED.

1. Damages: $22,287.35
2. Costs: $539.85

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $22,827.20

Proposed judgment to be submitted.
